titleStmt.title: SII 7.346: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 346. (A.R. No. 153 of 1901). ON THE FIFTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatē namaḥ . śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ . śrīgurubhyō(ṁ) namaḥ . ni¨rvvighnama
stu [.] namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya sakavaruṣa 1397The year 1397 is clear on the impression. It has been wrongly read as 1387 in theAnnual Report on Epigraphy for 1901.saṁdu yeṁṭaneya va¨rtamāna maṁnyatha saṁvatsara
da kā¨rttika su 1 lū śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa virupākṣamahārā
yaru vijayanagariya rājadhāniyalū sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁda samasta va¨rnnadha(ṁ)¨rmmā śrama
ṁgaḷanū pratipālisutta(ṁ) viha kāladalū A virupākṣamahārāyara siṁgaṇadaṇāyakara nirūpa
diṁda viṭhṭharasavoḍeyarū bārakūrarājyava nāḷuva kāladalū cauḷiyakēriya kellaṁgeṟe
ya vināyakadēvara saṁnidhiyalū mādaṇasūḍara makkaḷu boṁmiseṭṭiya baḷiya mā
dhaṇasoḍaru Avara taṁma saṁṇaseṭṭiyaru Avara taṁma nāraṇaseṭṭiyaru yī mūvarū vo
ppi dhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi dhāreya neṟadu māḍida chatrada maṭhada dha(ṁ)¨rmmakke barasida bāḷikeya
śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare pratidina 1 kaṁ maṭhadalū Uṁba brāhmaṇa ja 5 A chatrada Aḍuva
brāhmaṇaru jana 1 Ubhayaṁ jana 6 kkaṁ prativaruṣa 1 kaṁ Akki mu 60 kkaṁ A bāḷikeya vivara maṇa
vūravoḷage koṭagiya bayelavoḷage tāU baddhabrahmadāyada mūlada bāḷa catusīmeya viva
ra mūḍalu Accutāḷuvana bageyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu nīru hariva tōḍiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu yī yeraḍu gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittūdu gadde mā 1 . ge gēṇi Akki mu 5 yī bāḷige taṁtrā
ḷu vara Appaṇeyiṁda taṁkava teṟuvada modalu mattaṁ teṁka kuduravoḷage mūḍalu hoḷaraḷaga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu hoḷaraḷagaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī yeraḍu gaḍiyiṁ doḷage bi
ttuva bedegaṇagilu hiriyahāneyalū hā 40 gaddege gēṇi Akki mu 5 yī bāḷige ta
ṁtrāḷuvara Appaṇe [Ēḷu] tārada teṟe modalu mattaṁ baḍagakuduralū mūḍalu Aṁṇa hōraḷa
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu kōṭadadēvaru dēvasvada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī yeraḍu
gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittūdu hā 45 yi bāḷa teṁka tōḍina kaṭina baḷiyali mūḍalu māḷeUpādhya
na gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu kōṭada dēvara dēvasvadiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī yeraḍu gaḍiyi
ṁ voḷage bittūdu hā 25 Ubhayaṁ hā 70 gadege gēṇi Akki mu 8 teṟu Aṟutārada modalu hoḷe
yiṁda paḍuva taṭi mūḍalu pūrāḍiyahōraḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu kōṭada dēvara dēva
svadiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī yeraḍu gaḍiyiṁvoḷage bittūdu mu 2 gaddege gēṇi Akki mu 8 Aṟutārada teṟe
ge modalu mattaṁ teṁgina makkiyavoḷage mūḍalu keṟeya hōraḷagaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hōḷa
kkaḷamayyakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu yī gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittūdu hā 40 gaddege gēṇi Akkimu 4 te
ṟu mūṟutārada modalu mattaṁ viṭṭaṇabāḷavoḷage mūḍalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvala paḍuvalu mūṟu
kē¨ryya baḷiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittūdu hā 70 gaddege gēṇi Akki mu 7 yēḷu
tārada modala teṟu mattaṁ kōṭiyavoḷage bhaṭara keṟeya bayalavoḷage mūḍalu midiyiṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu māvinakaṭṭiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittūdu mu 3 gadde yī bāhasi
ḍuvakaḍe mūḍalu kaṭṭiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu jaṁtakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī gaḍiyiṁda
voḷage bittūdu hā 40 gadde Ubhayaṁ mu 6 guṁmeya bāgilagadeha 1 ya gēṇiya hākuva gade hā 5
Adaṟa paḍuvaṇagadde hā 15 A(ṁ)ntu mu 4 . ke gadde bayalōḷage nāyara mūla teṟu dēvasva kaḷaci baha Akki mu
10 A(ṁ)ntu mādaṇasūḍara bageyiṁda Akki mu 51 saṁtuseṭiya bageyiṁda maṇaŪralū
ravoḷage A bāḷa gaḍiya vivara cāṭuva viṣṇumayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu heṁjeṟe
ya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu bācaṇabāsiriya brāhmaṇige barada bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu gōviṁ
dabāsiriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī catusīmeyiṁdoḷage bittūdu hāne 20 Aliṁda teṁka
kaḍe hoḷadēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu tuṁgadēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī gaḍiyiṁdoḷa
ge bittūdu yeraḍu gadevu kūḍi hāne 32 mattaṁ haṁḍeyagaḍiya paḍuva gade hā 8 mattaṁ vi
ṣṇumayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu mādaṇasūḍana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bi
ttūdu gadde 1 kaṁ hā 30 A(ṁ)ntubage 4 kkaṁ bittūdu mu 2 . yī bāḷige teṟu yeṁṭutārada mo
dalu yī bāḷige gēṇi Akki mu 10 mattaṁ maṇavūravoḷage viṣnumayyana maga vāstēvamayya ko
ṭṭa bāḷina catusīmeya vivara mūḍa bayalu māleya tōḍinavoḷage A bāḷagaḍi kuḍukūra ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu mattaṁ kuḍukūra gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu sēnabōva rāmana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu śivabhaṭṭana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī nālkupagaḍiyiṁvoḷage bittūdu nāghaṁ
ḍugadalū hāne 40 yī bāḷige teṟu mūṟu tārada modalu mattaṁ mādhavasēnabōva koṭṭa bāḷi
na gaḍiya vivara śivabhaṭṭana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu mahādēvara bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu hegga
ḍe baḷiya bīraṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu heggaḍebaḷiya saṁkaraseṭṭiya
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī catusīmeyiṁdoḷage bittūdu gade mu 2 yī bāḷige ka
ṭuṁdeṟu kāṭi ga 1 vubhayaṁ mu 3 gadege gēṇi mu 11 mattaṁ guṁḍigaḍiya baya
lavūḷage A bāḷa gaḍiya vivara mādaṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu mattaṁ mādaṇa
seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu Aḷapeya kāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu mattaṁ mā
daṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī catusīmeyiṁdoḷage bittūdu mu 1 ke gēṇi
Akki mu 4 yi bāḷige teṟu tāra 4 yi Akkiyavoḷage saṁkarabāsirige voba brāhma
ṇa vuṁba dha(ṁ)¨rmmava māḍidakke saṁkuseṭiya bageyiṁda naḍava Akki muḍi 10 ttu
mattaṁ nāraṇaseṭṭi dha(ṁ)¨rmmakke māḍi barasida bāḷa vivara haraṣeṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍu
valu teṁkalu haraṣeṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu maṭhada gaḍiya gaḍiyiṁda
ṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu saṁkarahēraḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī catusīmeyiṁdo
ḷage bittuva bedegaṇagilu mu 3 ṟu hāne 30 ttu mattaṁ Alliṁdaṁ baḍagalu A bāḷa catu
sīmeya vivara mūḍalu halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍagalu paḍuvalu maneṭhāU sahavāgi halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷa gadebāḷu bittūdu
bedegaṇagilu muḍe 1 dahana ha 10 ttu Aṁttu bittūdu muḍe 5 du yi bāḷiṁge
gēṇi Akki mūḍe ha 14 yi bāḷiṁge teṟena modalu kāṭiya haṇa 5 yi Ayidu ha
ṇava tettu maṭhada da(ṁ)¨rmmakke bāḷuvudu mattaṁ mādaṁṇasūḍara mane mūḍalu naḍava hādi
(di)yiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gōjiraḍiya baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lu tuṁga śrīpādaṁgaḷa mayyakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu parapaḷi nāya
ri hoḷavaṁṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittuva bedegaṇa
gilu nāghaṁḍugadalu muḍe ha 10 ttu Alli vuḷaṁthā beṭu tiṭi mara phala sahita mā
daṁṇasūḍaru māḍida dha¨r(ṁ)mmakke Akki mūḍe 1 yi Akkiyanū maṭhake (naḍa) naḍasi tānū saṁtānada
varu bāḷuvaru sāla mūlake koḍasalladu taṁda baḍḍige koḍasalladu sālava koḍasalladu ba
yarali baṁda makaḷige koḍuvudu saladu bārakūramaṭhada pāripatyava kaṁḍu pariṇāmisi yiha
ru bāḷa tīrade yidare maṭhada dha(ṁ)¨rmmake hāyikkuvaru yī bāḷige tera modalu kāṭiya voṁdu
haṇavanu tara teruvaru yi teṟa teṟana mada
Āruvārada baradu koṭṭa . Ā A¨rthavanū ta(ṁ)mma kayiyiṁda kittu yī bāḷu kiḍisi ko
ṭu Āyivaru halaru ṟavaru yī pāripatyavanu halaru kaṁḍedillāyeṁdare
maṇaŪra taṁtrāḷana voppa .
Digital edition of SII 7.346 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
